name: kenya-health-mcp
description: MCP server for Kenya health system data — NHIF/SHA contributions, public facility registry (47 counties), maternal health protocols, and Article 43 constitutional health rights in English and Kiswahili.

tools.name: get_nhif_contribution
tools.description: NHIF/SHA monthly contribution for any gross salary

tools.name: find_facility
tools.description: Public health facilities by Kenya county and KEPH level

tools.name: get_maternal_protocol
tools.description: Kenya antenatal care schedule and Linda Mama free maternity guide

tools.name: get_health_right
tools.description: Constitution of Kenya 2010 Article 43 health rights EN/SW
